side_effects.description: Initial GHK-CU batch (glow) burned for ~12 hours in wrong injection spot; newer batch in lower abdomen between beltline and belly button burns less

protocol_notes: Prefers lower abdomen injection site (between beltline and horizontal line with belly button) for less burning with GHK-CU. Notes that GHK-CU and NAD are commonly overfilled; reconstitutes and doses based on COA actual content rather than label. Example: labeled 500mg NAD vial was actually ~700mg.
